texto: Love is passion obsession someone you can't live without. If you don't start with that what are you going to end up with? Fall head over heels. I say find someone you can love like crazy and who'll love you the same way back. And how do you find him? Forget your head and listen to your heart.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a William Parrisb: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Love is passion obsession someone you can't live without. If you don't start with that what are y…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, companionship, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao.
